transactions: June 5, 2008:Drafted by theMinnesota Twinsin the1st round(14th pick) of the 2008 amateur draft. Player signed June 13, 2008.
November 11, 2015:Traded by theMinnesota Twinsto theNew York YankeesforJohn Ryan Murphy.
